tasks.description: Wrote agent/cleanup-cursor-entries.mjs to DELETE the 12 mislabeled provider=cursor rows from Neon ai_interactions. Script required 3 rewrites: pg (not installed) → @neondatabase/serverless via dynamic import (neon not a function) → createRequire (fetch failed). Ultimately unresolved — could not locate the correct database endpoint despite checking Neon console, cpm-vercel and malloyyo Vercel env vars, and direct psql connections.

Updated all 3 HTML files and REFERENCE.md with corrected ROI numbers after removing Cursor from provider tables: 2,185× ROI (was 2,972×), $4,261 value (was $5,796), 30.6h (was 42.4h), 11 sessions (was 23), 91% first-pass (was 95%). All docs committed.
tasks.output: CPM Agent System — ROI & HITL Guide.html, CPM Agent — Architecture & ROI Guide.html, CPM Agent System — Project Summary (Updated).html, REFERENCE.md
